report.summary: Community growth cycle v18 (Mar 25 late): Drafted 6 new tweets (#167-172) covering Tokenized Real Estate, Web3 Gaming, Extreme Fear Contrarian thread, Crypto On-Ramps, Portfolio Allocation, and Post-Convergence recap teaser. Created Discord/TG T-2 convergence update and Newsletter v28 weekend edition section. New SVG social card: Extreme Fear Contrarian (5 historical return cards + median +38.4% stat + fear gauge + market context). Calendar extended through Tue Apr 1.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #167: Tokenized Real Estate spotlight — $4B on-chain, fractional from $50, 8-12% rental yields. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 3PM ET.
Tweet #168: Web3 Gaming/GameFi guide — $12B trading volume, play-and-earn model. Scheduled: Mon Mar 31, 12PM ET.
Tweet #169: Extreme Fear Contrarian thread (3 parts) — 5 historic sub-10 F&G readings, median +38.4% 90-day return, stablecoin/outflow/ETF signal stack. Scheduled: Wed Mar 26, 12PM ET.
Tweet #170: Crypto On-Ramps guide — every fiat→crypto route compared, Apple/Google Pay, lowest fees. Scheduled: Mon Mar 31, 4PM ET.
Tweet #171: Portfolio Allocation guide — risk-adjusted models 5-50% crypto, institutional allocation trends. Scheduled: Tue Apr 1, 10AM ET.
Tweet #172: Post-Convergence Recap teaser — options resolution, SEC outcomes, XRP classification, smart money flow. Scheduled: Fri Mar 28, 6PM ET.
Discord/TG T-2 Update: Convergence prep checklist with 3 catalyst cards and 4 tool links. Wed Mar 25, 10PM ET.
Newsletter v28 Section: Weekend edition — 'What Convergence Thursday Means for Your Portfolio', 5 new guides, Degen Corner contrarian signal.
Content calendar v40 extended through Tue Apr 1 — 8 new pieces across Twitter, Discord/TG, Email.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Extreme Fear Contrarian (1200x630) — Five glass-morphism historical return cards (Feb 2022 +38%, Jun 2022 +22%, Nov 2022 +54%, Sep 2023 +47%, Aug 2024 +31%) with green bold percentages. Highlighted median box: +38.4% over 90 days. Market context strip (Stablecoins $313B ATH, Exchange -$420M, ETFs +4 wks). Fear gauge bar showing F&G at 8. Bottom market context: BTC $71,300, 46-day streak, $13.5B expiry, 91 SEC rulings, Options Uncapped. Brand gradient top and bottom. Saved to reports/social-cards/2026-03-25-social-card-extreme-fear-contrarian.svg
